persona_name: Marcus — Returning User with Multiple Trips

ai_behavior_issues.issue: AI called create_itinerary_items a second time with identical items after already receiving the tool result confirming 13 items were created. The backend correctly returned already_exists with 0 new items, but the duplicate call wastes a tool loop iteration.
ai_behavior_issues.context: Step 5: Planning mode Santorini itinerary. After the first create_itinerary_items succeeded (13 items), the AI narrated the itinerary in text, then called create_itinerary_items again with the same 13 items.

usefulness_evaluation.narrative: All core multi-trip workflows performed excellently. Vague trip matching ('my Greece trip' to 'Greek Islands Hopping') worked perfectly on first try. Trip switching ('take me to my Morocco trip') correctly selected the existing trip without confusion. New trip creation for New Zealand correctly used create_trip instead of select_trip. The 3-day Santorini itinerary was comprehensive with 13 well-structured items across sightseeing, meals, and activities. The only minor issue was a duplicate tool call for create_itinerary_items which the backend handled gracefully.
